name: latency-hunter
description: Latency Hunter Toolkit — quant-engineering skills for Claude Code. backtest-guard audits backtests for look-ahead bias / overfitting / unrealistic execution costs; latency-audit reviews C++ low-latency trading hot paths for lock contention, false sharing, cache misses, heap allocation, syscalls and copies; connector-forge generates production-grade Binance/OKX market-data & trading connectors (reconnect, heartbeat, rate-limit, signing, time-sync). No alpha, no keys, no models — engineering only.
